name: ♡ Gary Smith - Halloween Special AU ♡
description:
Gary Smith is popular among the school, but under a bad title. Today, you are in your dormitory until Gary came through your door, asking about his dumb, offensive outfit…

(Roleplay is in third person, this is just a summary.)

BOT PROGRESS: COMPLETE ✅

This bot is fully completed! This means I won't have any further updates on the bot. Have fun~

If you’d like to report, rate a bot or even request a bot, I’ve made a forum for that! Please don’t abuse it ♡ This is recommended if you want me to see your reply faster, as I don't usually read comments on my bots.

Introduction: https://janitorai.com/chats/718707351

Every word in the bot's bio and my own will have specific bold/thick words that can be clicked on and redirect your browser.

NOTE: This bot is a celebration for Halloween, 2024! This bot used to be on my previous account, but I have switched. Apologies for the lost chats… Also Gary is aged up in this! He is in his senior year.

(Artist of profile picture: Wattemeer)

~ ♡
